tool_landed_tagline: Shixnaddaadu dhab ahaan intee bay ku kacaysaa?
tool_landed_desc: Xisaabi qiimaha guud ee dhabta ah ee badeeco kasta oo la soo dhoofiyo. Geli qiimaha alaab-qeybiyahaaga, dalka asalka, koodhka HS, habka saadka, iyo halka la geynayo — hel faahfaahin buuxda oo ku saabsan canshuurta soo-dejinta, VAT, saadka, caymiska, iyo kharashka beddelka sarrifka.
tool_landed_feat_0: Heerarka canshuurta 25+ meelood oo la geeyo
tool_landed_feat_1: 28 qeybood oo koodh HS ah oo la daboolo
tool_landed_feat_2: Xulasho saad badeed, hawo, iyo waddo
tool_landed_feat_4: Qiime dhab ah oo halkiiba ku qoran lacagtaada
tool_fx_tagline: Khatarta lacagtu intee bay kugu kacaysaa?
tool_fx_desc: Qaabee sida dhaqdhaqaaqa qiimaha sarrifku u saameeyo heerarka faa'iidadaada. Geli qiimaha iibkaaga, lacagta alaab-qeybiyaha, iyo heerka faa'iidada aad hiigsanayso — arag heerka baaqiga iyo saameynta faa'iidada ee xaaladaha hoos-u-dhaca fudud, dhexdhexaad, iyo daran.
tool_vat_tagline: Ku dar ama ka saar canshuurta hal gujis
tool_vat_desc: Xisaabi VAT, GST, ama canshuurta iibka 30 dal. Ku dar canshuur qiime saafi ah ama ka soo saar canshuur qiime guud. Waxay taageertaa heerar caadi, la dhimay, iyo eber oo leh xeerar dal-gaar ah.
tool_vat_feat_1: Ku dar VAT ama ka soo saar qiime guud
tool_vat_feat_4: Si toos ah u aqoonsada VAT / GST / Canshuurta Iibka
tool_vat_feat_5: Shax tixraac buuxda oo heerar ah
tool_margin_tagline: Waa maxay faa'iidadaada dhabta ah kharashaadka oo dhan ka dib?
tool_margin_desc: Xisaabi heerka faa'iidadaada dhabta ah iyo kordhinta badeeco-kasta. Ku dar gaarsiin, khidmadaha barxadda, iyo canshuurta soo-dejinta si aad u aragto farqiga u dhexeeya faa'iidadaada fudud iyo tan dhabta ah. Isbarbardhig badeecooyin badan oo dhinac-dhinac.
tool_margin_feat_0: Faa'iido dhab ah kharashaadka oo dhan ka dib
tool_cogs_tagline: Badeeco kasta dhab ahaan intee bay kugu kacaysaa?
tool_cogs_desc: Xisaabi qiimaha dhabta ah ee alaabta la iibiyay badeeco-kasta. Ku dar walxaha, shaqaalaha, gaarsiinta, xidhmada, iyo kharashka guud ee la qeybiyay. Arag saamiga COGS-kaaga, faa'iidada guud, iyo sida aad ula barbardhigto cabbirrada warshadaha.
tool_breakeven_tagline: Immisa xabbadood ka hor inta aadan faa'iido helin?
tool_breakeven_desc: Geli kharashaadkaaga go'an, qiimaha iibka, iyo kharashka isbeddelaya xabbadiiba. Isla markiiba arag barta baaqigaaga oo xabbado iyo dakhli ah, faa'iidada wax-ku-biirinta, xaaladaha faa'iidada ee tiro kala duwan, iyo falanqaynta dareen-qabka qiimaha.
tool_breakeven_feat_4: Kharashaadka go'an ee bille ama sannadle
faq_0_q: Qalabkanu ma dhab ahaan bilaash baa?
faq_0_a: Haa — gebi ahaanba bilaash, isdiiwaangelin looma baahna. U isticmaal in alaa intaad rabto. Waxaa dhisay AskBiz, POS telefoon iyo raadraaca ganacsi oo ay isticmaalaan miisaska suuqa iyo ganacsiyada yaryar ee Afrika iyo UK oo dhan. Haddii aad waxtar u aragto, waxaa hoosta ku yaal link aad wax badan ka baran karto.
faq_1_q: Heerarka canshuurtu intee bay sax yihiin?
faq_1_a: Heerarka canshuurta waxaa laga soo qaatay UK Global Tariff, US HTS, iyo EU Combined Nomenclature, oo saddex-biloodle la cusboonaysiiyo. Waa kuwo tilmaan ah — had iyo jeer ku xaqiiji dilaal kastam ama xogta canshuurta rasmiga ah ka hor inta aadan gaarin go'aan soo-dejin oo weyn. Heerarku way isbeddeli karaan heshiisyada ganacsiga iyo ku dhawaaqista miisaaniyadda.
faq_2_q: Waa maxay qiimaha guud ee soo-gaarsiinta?
faq_2_a: Qiimaha guud ee soo-gaarsiinta waa wadarta kharashka lagu keeno badeeco alaab-qeybiyahaaga ilaa bakhaarkaaga, oo ay ku jiraan qiimaha alaab-qeybiyaha, saadka caalamiga, canshuurta soo-dejinta, VAT/GST, nadaafadda kastam, caymiska, iyo beddelka lacagta. Soo-dhoofiyeyaal badan ayaa ku qiyaas-yaraysta qiimahooda dhabta ah 15–30% iyagoo iska indho-tiraya mid ama in ka badan oo qeybahan ah.
faq_3_q: Waa maxay khatarta sarrifka ee soo-dhoofiyeyaasha?
faq_3_a: Haddii aad badeecooyinkaaga ku qiimayso GBP laakiin alaab-qeybiyeyaashaada ku bixiso USD ama CNY, isbeddel ku yimaada qiimaha sarrifku wuxuu beddelaa kharashkaaga dhabta ah — xitaa haddii qiimaha alaab-qeybiyuhu isku mid ahaado. Hoos-u-dhac 10% ah oo GBP ka gaadha USD wuxuu ka dhigan yahay in alaabtaada USD-ku-qiimaysan ay 10% ka qaalisan tahay GBP. Qaabeeyaha Khatarta Sarrifku wuxuu si sax ah kuu tusaa inta faa'iido aad lumiso heerar sarrif kala duwan.
faq_4_a: Koodhka HS (Harmonised System) waa lambar 6-god ah oo ay adeegsadaan hay'adaha kastamka adduunka oo dhan si loo kala saaro alaabta la ganacsado. Koodhkaaga HS wuxuu go'aamiyaa heerka canshuurta soo-dejintaada. Xisaabiyaha Qiimaha Guud wuxuu ku jiraa qeybaha ugu caansan — haddii aad u baahantahay koodh gaar ah, UK Trade Tariff (gov.uk/trade-tariff) waa tixraaca rasmiga ah.
faq_5_q: Ma u isticmaali karaa qorshaynta ganacsigayga?
faq_5_a: Haa — qalabkan waxaa loogu talagalay qorshaynta ganacsiga. U isticmaal Xisaabiyaha Qiimaha Guud si aad u dejiso qiimeynta badeecada oo sax ah iyo Qaabeeyaha Khatarta Sarrifka si aad u tijaabiso faa'iidooyinkaaga ka hor dalab weyn oo iibsi ah. Falanqayn qoto dheer oo ku xiran xogtaada iibka tooska ah, barxadda buuxda ee AskBiz aad bay uga fogaataa.
schema_page_desc: Xisaabiyayaal ganacsi oo bilaash ah — heerka faa'iidada, qiimaha guud, khatarta sarrifka, VAT, iyo falanqaynta baaqiga ee milkiilayaasha ganacsi yar ee Afrika iyo UK.
hero_label: Qalab bilaash ah · Isdiiwaangelin looma baahna
hero_sub: Xisaabiyayaal bilaash ah oo loogu talagalay soo-dhoofiyeyaasha, dhoofiyeyaasha, iyo milkiilayaasha ganacsiga. Qiimaha guud, khatarta sarrifka, VAT, iyo falanqaynta baaqiga — ilbiriqsiyo gudahood, xisaab looma baahna.
why_title: Sababta Soo-dhoofiyeyaasha Badankood ay u Qiyaas-yaraystaan Kharashaadkooda
why_body_2: Qiimaha guud ee dhabta ahi wuxuu ku jiraa canshuurta soo-dejinta (0–45% iyadoo ku xiran badeecada iyo halka la geynayo), VAT ama GST oo dhan qiimaha CIF, khidmadaha nadaafadda kastam, caymiska, iyo kharashka qarsoon ee beddelka lacagta. Shixnad muuqata mid faa'iido leh marxaladda qiimaynta alaab-qeybiyaha ayaa noqon karta mid khasaare leh markay gaarto bakhaarkaaga.
why_body_3: Xisaabiyahayaga Qiimaha Guud wuxuu ku daraa kuwan oo dhan. Qaabeeyahayaga Khatarta Sarrifku wuxuu ku tusaa waxa ku dhaca faa'iidadaada haddii qiimaha sarrifku ka dhaqaaqo 5%, 10%, ama 20% adiga kaa gees ah — ka hor inta aadan gelin dalab weyn oo iibsi ah.
example_title: Tusaale: 1,000 funaanadood oo cudbi ah oo laga keeno Shiinaha ilaa UK
cta_title: Ma Rabtaa in Xisaabintaani ku Xirnaato Xogtaada Tooska ah?
cta_sub: AskBiz wuxuu ku xirmaa M-Pesa, Shopify, QuickBooks, iyo kuwo kale — wuxuuna hore u buuxiyaa qalabkan badeecooyinkaaga, qiimayaashaaga, iyo faa'iidooyinkaaga dhabta ah. Ku weydii su'aalo Ingiriisi fudud oo hel jawaabo ku salaysan tirooyinkaaga dhabta ah.
footer_disclaimer: Heerarku waa tilmaan waana saddex-biloodle la cusboonaysiiyo. Had iyo jeer ku xaqiiji xogaha canshuurta rasmiga ah ka hor inta aadan gaarin go'aannada soo-dejinta.
lc_ph_selling_price: Geli si aad u aragto faa'iidada
